scope.kind: exact bounded public preset control rerun

summary.claim_boundary: No Seed Search; exact dictionary rerun only; not public preset promotion; not `.tlmr` format support; not natural-corpus proof.
summary.conclusion: The bounded exact rerun blocks promotion: project-token removal keeps paired-shadow controls negative, leave-family-out clears controls but falls below the three-group ordinary floor, and leave-family-out plus project-token removal removes the signal.

variant_summaries.description: Recompute standards-public-v1 as the exact baseline.
variant_summaries.success_rule: reference only; expected to preserve the current control failure

variant_summaries.description: Remove entries containing Telomere/project-specific leakage tokens.
variant_summaries.success_rule: ordinary negative groups >=3, control negative groups ==0, and project-token hits ==0

variant_summaries.description: Remove every common-family entry and keep target-family standards entries.
variant_summaries.success_rule: ordinary negative groups >=3 and control negative groups ==0

variant_summaries.description: Keep target-family standards entries but remove project-token entries and common entries.
variant_summaries.success_rule: ordinary negative groups >=3, control negative groups ==0, and project-token hits ==0

variant_summaries.description: Use common entries plus all standards families except the compressed corpus family.
variant_summaries.success_rule: ordinary negative groups >=3 and control negative groups ==0

variant_summaries.description: Leave the compressed family out and also remove every project-token entry.
variant_summaries.success_rule: ordinary negative groups >=3, control negative groups ==0, and project-token hits ==0

variant_summaries.description: Recompute the generic common-token baseline for matched-control context.
variant_summaries.success_rule: reference only; standards variants must beat this baseline before promotion

stop_rules: Do not promote public preset metadata to `.tlmr`.
Do not describe the projection as decode proof.
Do not claim public dictionary presets prove natural-corpus compression.
Reopen only with a new decoder-public preset design or externally sourced corpus bank that passes the same controls.

parallel_agent_next_steps.task: Design a non-project vocabulary corpus bank before any further preset wins are counted.
Keep preset/version metadata research-only until leave-family-out wins exceed the promotion floor.
Require standards variants to beat generic/common controls under identical metadata charges.
